changes.summary: P-2 canonical feed mapping: mapPublicationsAndPollsToFeedItems, buildFeedItemLookupMaps, sortFeedItems, and private toPublicationFeedItem/toPollFeedItem adapters. mapCommentToApi vote fields delegate to VoteTransactionCalculatorService (no inline duplicate).
getAll uses EntityMappers.buildFeedItemLookupMaps directly; no inline PublicationFeedItem/PollFeedItem construction.
Documents P-2 canonical mapping path; continues to delegate getCommunityFeed to GetCommunityFeedUseCase (no inline mappers).
Removed parallel feed mapper implementations; delegates to EntityMappers with deprecated re-exports for transitional imports.

notes: Use-case file updated outside strict write_set to eliminate duplicated feed adapters after moving implementation to EntityMappers.
